Items.Text: Use up and down arrow keys to navigate. Press Enter or Space Bar keys to select.
Gebruik de pijltjestoetsen (omhoog en omlaag) om te navigeren. Druk op Enter of de spatiebalk om de waarde te selecteren.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Show select all
PropertyTypes.Description: Add a button to select/deselect all options.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Read-only style
PropertyTypes.Description: How the combo box will appear in read-only mode.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Debounce interval
PropertyTypes.Description: The debounce interval for each filter input change event triggered in milliseconds.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Aria label
PropertyTypes.Description: Used to describe the combo box.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Clear selection button
PropertyTypes.Description: Used to clear all selected values.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Remove value button
PropertyTypes.Description: Used to remove individual selected values when using labels with multi-selection.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Selected value
PropertyTypes.Description: Output example: "Selected value: Avocado, Apple, Banana."

PropertyTypes.Caption: Instructions
PropertyTypes.Description: Instructions to be read after announcing the status.

Translations.Text: Use up and down arrow keys to navigate. Press Enter or Space Bar keys to select.
Gebruik de pijltjestoetsen (omhoog en omlaag) om te navigeren. Druk op Enter of de spatiebalk om de waarde te selecteren.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Selected items sorting
PropertyTypes.Description: How selected items should be sorted.
